name: CoinGecko
description: Free cryptocurrency data API. Access real-time prices, market data, historical charts, exchange info, trending coins, NFT data, and global crypto market statistics for 10,000+ coins.

capabilities.name: simple_price
capabilities.description: Get the current price of one or more coins in specified currencies.

capabilities.name: simple_token_price
capabilities.description: Get the current price of tokens by contract address on a specific platform.

capabilities.name: simple_supported_currencies
capabilities.description: List all supported fiat and crypto currencies for price queries.

capabilities.name: coins_list
capabilities.description: List all supported coins with IDs, names, and symbols.

capabilities.name: coins_markets
capabilities.description: Get market data for coins including price, market cap, volume, and sparkline.

capabilities.name: coins_get
capabilities.description: Get comprehensive data for a specific coin including description, links, and market data.

capabilities.name: coins_tickers
capabilities.description: Get exchange tickers for a specific coin.

capabilities.name: coins_history
capabilities.description: Get historical data for a coin on a specific date.

capabilities.name: coins_market_chart
capabilities.description: Get historical market chart data (price, market cap, volume) over a time range.

capabilities.name: coins_market_chart_range
capabilities.description: Get historical market chart data within a specific Unix timestamp range.

capabilities.name: exchanges_list
capabilities.description: List all supported exchanges with trading volume and metadata.

capabilities.name: exchanges_get
capabilities.description: Get detailed data for a specific exchange.

capabilities.name: exchanges_tickers
capabilities.description: Get trading pairs and tickers for a specific exchange.

capabilities.name: search_query
capabilities.description: Search for coins, categories, and exchanges by keyword.

capabilities.name: search_trending
capabilities.description: Get trending search coins, NFTs, and categories in the last 24 hours.

capabilities.name: global_data
capabilities.description: Get cryptocurrency global market data including total market cap, volume, and dominance.

capabilities.name: categories_list
capabilities.description: List all cryptocurrency categories with market data.
